creator: cam@vasteel.io
text:
Same for me on a fresh install of FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (with llvm15-15.0.7_10):

Martin Neubauer's  fix to add "-Wl,--undefined-version" to the port's Makefile fails with (maybe I need llvm17 for this to work?):

===>>> make build failed for www/firefox
